title: Just Weaponry
description: Simplest Weaponry mod for fabric. Now with forge support!
body:
**I've spent countless hours looking for a good weapons mod for fabric. Everything I found was too complicated, had a lot of dependencies or wasn't for the versions I wanted. 
So, _Just Weaponry_ is here so YOU don't have to spend forever looking for one.**
![Just Weaponry logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8145942aa6b2691d0831367bef754acac561468b.jpeg)
Just Weaponry focuses on simply adding new and vanilla like weapons to the game.
There are currently 8 weapons, the dagger, the greatsword, the spear, the battleaxe, the longblade, the katana, the swollow, and the staff.

### Info:

WE JUST HIT 1,000 DOWNLOADS! I AM WORKING ON A BIG UPDATE!

New Custom License as of April 3rd 2025

### Features:

JW adds a variety of weapons. Here are the weapons that are currently in the mod.


## The Dagger.
The dagger is a fast, low damaging weapon that deals a mid amount of knockback.
you can craft the dagger like this:

<details>
<summary>Crafting</summary>

![Iron Dagger Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b96e920528378c8fa12efb215b542f7e8dc7e0e3_0.webp)

</details>

## The Staff.
The staff is a simple, balanced weapon that deals a normal amount of knockback.
you can craft the staff like this: 

<details>
<summary>Crafting</summary>

![Staff Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/459a22565d0a4dbc1cb74f87317bce60694e25e0.png)

## The Greatsword.
The Greatsword is a heavy, ultra high damaging weapon that deals a normal amount of knockback. You can craft the greatsword like this:


<details>
<summary>Crafting</summary>

![Iron Greatsword Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b7a9fe98c3358e56eb97dbcac1e259ce6045663.png)

## The Spear.
The Spear is a mid weapon ment for PvE. It deals a normal amount of knockback.
You can craft the spear like this:


<details>
<summary>Crafting</summary>

![Iron Spear Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77912f1ab3405b57efe624e2f82e0a6af14bd68d.png)

## The Battleaxe.
The battleaxe is a large battle weapon. it is not as effective for chopping trees, but it attacks fast! You can craft the Battleaxe like this:


<details>
<summary>Crafting</summary>

![Iron Battleaxe Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/334c0a339c33795bf88a9e4dcf43544cf5cf01af.png)

</details>

## The Longsword.
The longsword has been a long time coming to the mod. its a weapon in the middle of the road. With mid dmg and mid cooldown, its a handy weapon to have on hand. You can craft the Longsword like this:


<details>
<summary>Crafting</summary>

![Iron Longsword Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b14434014f6b3c441bcc8d527ddd535d534b0cea_0.webp)

</details>


## The Katana.
A nice Japanese based sword. I just said to myself "Hey what the heck? imma add katana." 
You can craft the Katana like this:

<details>
<summary>Crafting</summary>

![Iron Katana Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a8046cfe919317841bcbf841dba47ae714e38b9_0.webp)

</details>


## The Swollow.
The swollow is a two bladed weapon from the medieval area. I think it fits nicely in the mod and minecraft in general. Lots of dmg. Mid swing speed. You can craft it like this:

<details>
<summary>Crafting</summary>

![Iron Swollow Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8270c9f6f8410b467fc2b6d69dab31fac40bbe9_0.webp)

</details>


## The Longblade.
Its our first crafting component! With the Longblade, you can craft the Longsword and Swollow with this component. Heres how you craft it:

<details>
<summary>Crafting</summary>

## Q+A.

Q: Does this mod have any dependencies? 

A: Only one. Fabric API 

Q: Is this mod compatable with better combat? 

A: Version 0.7+ is compatable.

Q: Can you downgrade the mod to **X** version? 

A: Downgrading mods takes time. I might, but I also might not.

Q: Can you port this to forge?

A: I did!

Q: Do you maintain this project actively?  

A: For the most part 

Q: When update??? 

A: The mod is kind of finished. i will patch glitches and stuff though.

Q: Does this mod affect game performance?

A: Nah. its optimized to a good level. it will run smoothly unless your on a 2011 potato.

Q: I found a bug. 

A: You can report it by emailing us at: JW@MistAxis.com.

Q: Can I use this mod in my modpack?

A: Yes! I love making modpacks myself, so you can! but only on Modrinth. Be sure to credit me (Just Studios).

Q: But i want to make a modpack for a different website!

A: Please Email me. JW@MistAxis.com

Q: Can you add **X** weapon? 

A: If you have an idea for an update, you can email us at: JW@MistAxis.com I might not add the weapon you want, but im always open to ideas!

Q: I have another question. 

A: Please Email us at: JW@MistAxis.com i'll try to get back within a week. 

You can veiw our license [Here](https://gist.github.com/MistAxis/938d73203a559e056a2e792d1dca1bfa)
